nodes.name: Daily 7:30AM IST
nodes.notes: Runs daily at 07:30. Workflow timezone is Asia/Kolkata (see Settings), so this fires at 07:30 IST.

nodes.name: Fetch Morning Plans
nodes.notes: GET /api/production/morning-plan (internal auth). Returns { summaries: [...], meta } across ALL orgs. Each summary contains: organization_id, owner_phone, language_preference, date_label, order_count, orders_formatted, has_data. Only orgs with whatsapp_proactive_enabled=true, an owner phone, and at least one in-production order are included.

nodes.name: Split Into Plans
nodes.notes: Fans the summaries array to one item per org. Downstream nodes reference this node for item-stable lineage when the Send node strips org fields.

nodes.name: Has Data
nodes.notes: Defense-in-depth guard: has_data true, owner phone present, language set. The endpoint already enforces all three; this catches any contract drift.

nodes.name: Send Production Plan

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ to: $json.owner_phone, type: 'template', orgId: $json.organization_id, template: { name: $json.language_preference === 'gu' ? 'morning_production_plan_gujarati' : 'morning_production_plan', language: { code: $json.language_preference === 'gu' ? 'gu' : 'en' }, components: [{ type: 'body', parameters: [{ type: 'text', text: String($json.date_label) }, { type: 'text', text: String($json.order_count) }, { type: 'text', text: String($json.orders_formatted) }] }] } }) }}

nodes.notes: POST /api/whatsapp/send (internal auth) → Meta Cloud API. Sends morning_production_plan template (Utility, 3 body variables) to the org owner's WhatsApp — never a customer chat (Rule A). Variables: {{1}}=date_label, {{2}}=order_count, {{3}}=orders_formatted (multiline list, up to 5 orders). Gujarati variant when language_preference === 'gu'.

nodes.name: Log Plan Sent

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ orgId: $('Split Into Plans').item.json.organization_id, chatPhone: $('Split Into Plans').item.json.owner_phone, messageType: 'morning_production_plan_sent', timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

nodes.notes: POST /api/analytics/log-intent (internal auth) → PostHog. Privacy-safe: orgId + masked phone + event type only. Reads org/phone from Split node (last 1:1 node) since Send response strips them.

nodes.name: Error Trigger
nodes.notes: Set this workflow as its own Error Workflow in Settings > Error Workflow.

nodes.name: Log Error

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ source: 'n8n_morning_production_plan', error: $json.error?.message, workflow: $json.workflow?.name, node: $json.execution?.lastNodeExecuted, executionId: $json.execution?.id, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

nodes.notes: Logs failures to Sentry via /api/errors/log. Never messages a customer chat.
